revert_reason: Live garage QA showed the metallic/anime garage underlay and production vehicle PNGs were only partially integrated. Idle/default garage and interaction/open garage states diverged visually, and the garage read as not truly top down. Runtime now falls back to the pre-metallic procedural garage and vehicle renderer until a full consistent true-top-down garage replacement exists.

previously_rejected.reason: Generated poses retained front-facing facial and torso construction instead of strict overhead anatomy.
Generated pose read as lying on its back instead of standing upright on four feet from above.

follow_up_required: Keep the pre-metallic garage renderer active for all garage states.
Do not re-enable anime-pass-01 garage assets without matching default, selected, open, closed, interaction, departure, return, and mobile states.
Future garage replacement must be true top down and state complete before runtime integration.
